message.content:
@startuml
title US007 – As Director, I want to associate a human resource (user) to a project

actor "Authenticated User" as AU
participant ":System" as SYS

AU -> SYS : 1 Asks to associate a human resource (user) to a project
SYS --> AU : 2 Search for the Data
AU -> SYS : 3 Asks for Project List
SYS --> AU : 4 Shows Project List
AU -> SYS : 5 Asks for System User List
SYS --> AU : 6 Shows System User List
AU -> SYS : 7 Types data (email, projectCode, startDate, endDate, costPerHour, percentageOfAllocation)
SYS --> AU : 8 Shows Information Success

@enduml
